info.title: yauth API
info.description: Modular, plugin-based authentication API for Axum applications.

AdminSessionInfo.description: Session info returned by admin list endpoint.

AdminUserInfo.description: User info returned by admin list endpoint.

AuthConfigResponse.description: Server-side auth configuration exposed to frontends via `GET /config`.

allow_signups.description: Whether new user registration is allowed.

require_email_verification.description: Whether newly registered users must verify their email before logging in.

PaginatedSessionsResponse.description: Response type for `GET /admin/sessions` (schema-only, used for OpenAPI spec).

PaginatedUsersResponse.description: Response type for `GET /admin/users` (schema-only, used for OpenAPI spec).
